description_zh: 野猫部落的传奇故事，四大部落为领地和猎物而战，遵循星族指引和武士守则。从幼猫成长为伟大族长的旅程。
description_en: Epic tales of feral cat clans living wild in the forest. Four clans battle for territory and honor, guided by StarClan ancestors and the sacred Warrior Code. Journey from tiny kit to legendary leader.

progression_blockers: Must catch 10 pieces of prey before warrior ceremony
Must demonstrate loyalty to Warrior Code

ceremony_requirements.warrior: Complete 7 skills + mentor approval + leader decision
ceremony_requirements.deputy: Mentored 1 apprentice + high loyalty + current deputy dies/retires
ceremony_requirements.leader: Deputy status + leader dies + receive 9 lives from StarClan

clans.name: ThunderClan
clans.motto: In peace, respect. In war, fury.

territory.camp_location: Stone hollow protected by thorn barrier

clans.name: RiverClan
clans.motto: Like water, we flow and adapt.

clans.name: WindClan
clans.motto: Fleet of foot, fierce in battle.

ranks.description: Newborn to 6 months old, stay in nursery with mother
Training to become warrior, assigned a mentor

mentor_system.assignment: Leader chooses mentor based on personality match
mentor_system.can_change_mentor: Only if mentor dies, retires, or fails student

ceremony.words: From this day forward, until you have earned your warrior name, you will be known as [Name]paw. [Mentor], you are ready for an apprentice. You will be mentor to [Name]paw.
ceremony.response: I will pass on all I know.
ceremony.celebration: Whole clan calls apprentice's new name

ranks.description: Full clan member, hunts and defends territory
responsibilities: Hunt daily for clan (feed elders/queens/kits first)
Silent vigil after ceremony (entire night, no talking)

ceremony.trigger: Mentor approval + completed all skills + leader decision
ceremony.words: I, [Leader], leader of [Clan], call upon my warrior ancestors to look down on this apprentice. [They have] trained hard to understand the ways of your noble code, and I commend [them] to you as a warrior in [their] turn. [Name]paw, do you promise to uphold the warrior code and to protect and defend your Clan, even at the cost of your life?
ceremony.naming: Then by the powers of StarClan, I give you your warrior name. [Name]paw, from this moment you will be known as [Warrior Name]. StarClan honors your [virtue1] and [virtue2].
ceremony.vigil: Silent night watch at camp entrance
ceremony.celebration: Clan chants new name under stars

requirements: Must have mentored at least 1 apprentice
ranks.description: Second-in-command, organizes patrols and stands in for leader
responsibilities: Make decisions when leader is absent/unable

appointment.trigger: Previous deputy dies/retires OR leader needs deputy
appointment.timing: Must be named before moonhigh after previous deputy's death
appointment.words: I say these words before StarClan, so that the spirits of our warrior ancestors may hear and approve of my choice. The new deputy of [Clan] is [Name].
appointment.response: I will serve my Clan faithfully.

ranks.succession: Automatically becomes leader when current leader dies

requirements: Journey to Moonpool for 9 lives ceremony
ranks.description: Clan leader with 9 lives from StarClan, absolute authority

nine_lives_ceremony.process: 9 StarClan cats grant 1 life each with a virtue
nine_lives_ceremony.pain: Each life causes intense pain as it enters
nine_lives_ceremony.result: Can die 9 times before final death

ranks.description: Healer and spiritual guide, interprets StarClan's signs
responsibilities: Attend half-moon medicine cat meetings at Moonpool
Guide leader's decisions with StarClan's wisdom

training.healing_techniques: Set bones, treat wounds, cure illness

ranks.description: Pregnant or nursing mother, lives in nursery

requirements: Old age (100+ moons) OR permanent injury

seasons.description: Spring - prey returns, kits are born

seasons.clan_activity: Stock up prey, prepare dens for winter
events: Warrior ceremonies (rush to promote before leaf-bare)

seasons.danger: Most dangerous season, clan conflict for food

hunting_seasonality.mice: Available all year, less in leaf-bare

starclan_system.description: Afterlife for honorable warriors, ancestors watch over living clans
prophecy_examples: Fire alone will save our Clan (Firestar)
There will be three, kin of your kin, who hold the power of the stars (The Three)

dark_forest_system.description: Place of No Stars, where evil cats go after death
dark_forest_system.training: Forbidden battle techniques taught in dreams
dark_forest_system.temptation: Promises power and strength beyond clan training
dark_forest_system.corruption: Slowly turns cats against Warrior Code
dark_forest_system.great_battle: Final invasion attempt (Book 6: The Last Hope)
dark_forest_system.warning: Training here corrupts your soul - choose wisely!

gathering_system.truce: Sacred peace - StarClan covers moon if fighting starts
gathering_system.attendees: Leader, deputy, medicine cat + selected warriors/apprentices
gathering_system.social_aspect: Apprentices make friends with other clans (sometimes leads to romance)

the_prophecy_begins.title: Fire and Ice
the_prophecy_begins.prophecy: Fire alone will save our Clan
the_prophecy_begins.meaning: Firestar (former kittypet Rusty) will save ThunderClan
the_prophecy_begins.player_role: Can befriend Fireheart or be rival

the_new_prophecy.title: Journey to the Lake
the_new_prophecy.prophecy: Darkness, air, water, and sky will come together and shake the forest
the_new_prophecy.meaning: Four cats (one from each clan) must find new territory
the_new_prophecy.player_role: Join the journey OR stay behind

power_of_three.title: The Three
power_of_three.prophecy: There will be three, kin of your kin, who hold the power of the stars in their paws
power_of_three.meaning: Lionblaze, Jayfeather, Dovewing have special powers
power_of_three.player_role: Support The Three OR ally with Dark Forest

cross_clan_romance.consequences: Exile, loss of trust, kits split between clans

medicine_cat_romance.consequences: Loss of medicine cat role, shame

battle_moves.name: Back Kick
battle_moves.description: Explosive surprise move, kick with hind legs

battle_moves.name: Belly Rake
battle_moves.description: While on back, slash enemy's belly with all claws

battle_moves.name: Leap-and-Hold
battle_moves.description: Jump on enemy's back, grip with claws

npcs.name: Firestar
npcs.title: Leader of ThunderClan
npcs.backstory: Born Rusty, joined ThunderClan at 6 moons, rose from apprentice to legendary leader

relationship_stages.status: Close ally, chosen for important quests

npcs.name: Tigerstar
npcs.title: Leader of ShadowClan / Dark Forest Resident
npcs.backstory: ThunderClan warrior who betrayed clan, became ShadowClan leader, trained Dark Forest cats
npcs.dark_forest_role: Trains living cats in dreams to build army
npcs.warning: Befriending Tigerstar leads to dark endings

npcs.name: Graystripe
npcs.title: ThunderClan Deputy / Warrior
npcs.backstory: Firestar's best friend, had forbidden romance with Silverstream (RiverClan)
npcs.romance_tragedy: Silverstream died giving birth to his kits

npcs.name: Leafpool
npcs.title: ThunderClan Medicine Cat
npcs.personality: Gentle, wise, torn between duty and love
npcs.secret: Forbidden romance with Crowfeather, secret kits

npcs.name: Bluestar
npcs.title: Former Leader of ThunderClan
npcs.personality: Wise, tragic, noble, sacrificed love for duty
npcs.backstory: Gave up kits to become deputy, mentored Firestar
npcs.tragic_past: Secret romance with Oakheart (RiverClan), gave away kits

npcs.name: Yellowfang
npcs.title: Former ShadowClan Medicine Cat
npcs.personality: Grumpy but kind-hearted, tough love mentor
npcs.backstory: Broke medicine cat code, had kit (Brokenstar), exiled from ShadowClan
npcs.death: Smoke inhalation saving kits from fire

npcs.name: Sandstorm
npcs.title: ThunderClan Warrior
npcs.romance_option: Can be player's mate (if not Firestar's timeline)

npcs.name: Cinderpelt
npcs.title: ThunderClan Medicine Cat
npcs.backstory: Would-be warrior, leg injury forced medicine cat path
npcs.death: Killed by badger protecting Sorreltail's kits

locations.name: ThunderClan Camp
locations.description: Stone hollow protected by thorn barrier, surrounded by forest

locations.name: Training Hollow
locations.description: Sandy clearing where apprentices practice battle moves

locations.name: Sunningrocks
locations.description: Warm rocks by river, disputed territory between ThunderClan and RiverClan

locations.name: Fourtrees
locations.description: Four great oak trees where all clans gather at full moon under truce
locations.starclan_presence: Strong, covers moon if truce broken

locations.name: Moonpool
locations.description: Sacred pool where leaders and medicine cats communicate with StarClan
locations.location: Hidden in hills, surrounded by stone hollow

locations.name: Dark Forest / Place of No Stars
locations.description: Shadowy nightmare realm where evil cats go after death
locations.danger: Extreme - trains cats to betray clans
locations.appearance: Twisted trees, no stars, eternal darkness

locations.name: Twolegplace
locations.description: Human town where kittypets and rogues live
locations.clans_view: Weak, soft life (despised by most warriors)

locations.name: Highstones / Mothermouth
locations.description: Ancient mountains, old StarClan meeting place (before Moonpool)

rules: 1. Defend your Clan, even with your life. You may have friendships with cats from other Clans, but your loyalty must remain to your Clan.
2. Do not hunt or trespass on another Clan's territory.
3. Elders, queens, and kits must be fed before apprentices and warriors. Apprentices may not eat until they have hunted to feed the elders.
4. Prey is killed only to be eaten. Give thanks to StarClan for its life.
5. A kit must be at least six moons old to become an apprentice.
6. Newly appointed warriors will keep a silent vigil for one night after receiving their warrior name.
7. A cat cannot be made deputy without having mentored at least one apprentice.
8. The deputy will become Clan leader when the leader dies, retires, or is exiled.
9. After the death, retirement, or exile of the deputy, the new deputy must be chosen before moonhigh.
10. A Gathering of all four Clans is held at the full moon during a truce that lasts for the night. There shall be no fighting among Clans at this time.
11. Boundaries must be checked and marked daily. Challenge all trespassing cats.
12. No warrior can neglect a kit in pain or danger, even if the kit is from a different Clan.
13. The word of the Clan leader is the warrior code.
14. An honorable warrior does not need to kill other cats to win battles, unless they are outside the warrior code or if it is necessary for self-defense.

endings.requirements: Become leader + high loyalty + save clan multiple times
endings.description: You become a legendary leader like Firestar, remembered for generations in stories.

endings.requirements: Reach deputy + mentor 3+ apprentices + high honor
endings.description: You serve faithfully as deputy, guiding your clan with wisdom.

endings.requirements: Medicine cat path + cure greencough outbreak + receive major prophecy
endings.description: Your healing and connection to StarClan save countless lives.

endings.requirements: Train with Dark Forest + break Warrior Code 5+ times
endings.description: You fall to darkness, exiled from your clan. After death, you wander the Place of No Stars forever.

endings.requirements: Cross-clan romance + exile OR mate's death
endings.description: Love costs everything. You and your mate are torn apart by the code.

endings.requirements: Serve clan loyally for 100+ moons + retire
endings.description: You retire as honored elder, sharing wisdom until joining StarClan peacefully.

endings.requirements: Die protecting clan (battle, saving leader, etc.)
endings.description: You give your life for your clan. StarClan welcomes you as a hero, and your story is told to kits forever.

art_style: Semi-realistic warrior cats art style with expressive eyes and detailed fur, forest atmosphere with dappled sunlight filtering through trees, natural woodland setting with accurate cat anatomy, dramatic lighting emphasizing action poses (hunting crouch, battle leap, tender moments), storybook illustration quality matching official Warriors series covers by Wayne McLoughlin and Owen Richardson, earthy color palette (browns, grays, ginger, silver, black, white), seasons clearly shown (green leaves, snow, falling leaves, spring flowers)
copyright_notice: Inspired by Erin Hunter's Warriors series. Clan names, character names, and world elements retained for authenticity. Non-commercial fan work. Player story can diverge from canon timeline.
